seo.title: Studio-level Photography – AI Polished Product & Portraits | OpenCreator
seo.description: Produce studio-quality product and portrait photography with AI. Professional product photography services with simulated studio lighting, backgrounds, and product photo retouching services.

hero.title: Studio-level Photography
hero.description: Produce studio-quality product and portrait photography with AI. Simulate professional lighting, backgrounds, and retouching to achieve campaign-ready visuals without traditional studio sessions.
hero.inputPlaceholder: Upload your base product or portrait photo to upgrade to studio quality

steps.title: Upload existing product or portrait photos
steps.description: Start from basic captures shot in natural or imperfect lighting.

steps.title: Select studio style and background
steps.description: Choose seamless backdrops, gradient lighting, colored gels, or lifestyle-inspired studio setups.

steps.title: Enhance with AI retouching and lighting
steps.description: AI refines exposure, contrast, skin or surface details, and overall polish.

steps.title: Export for web, print, and campaigns
steps.description: Use upgraded visuals across PDPs, social, ads, and print collateral.

whoIsFor.title: For teams that need studio-quality images at scale
whoIsFor.subtitle: From e-commerce to personal branding, see who levels up photography with AI.

audiences.label: E-commerce and catalog teams
audiences.description: Standardize quality across large product libraries without reshooting everything.

audiences.label: Personal branding and creator teams
audiences.description: Turn simple photos into professional portraits for profiles, press, and campaigns.

audiences.label: Agencies and production studios

audiences.label: Small businesses

items.question: How do I upgrade photos to a studio look?
items.answer: Upload product or portrait images—AI simulates studio lighting, backgrounds, and retouching for polished, campaign-ready results.

items.question: Which backdrops and lighting can I choose?
items.answer: Seamless white, neutral gradients, colored gels, and lifestyle-inspired backdrops; select soft, hard, or rim lighting styles.

items.question: Can I control the retouching level?
items.answer: Yes. Choose subtle cleanup or stronger retouching for skin and surface details; preview before exporting.

items.question: Is output suitable for print and web?
items.answer: Export web-ready images or high-resolution files for print collateral, catalogs, and OOH.

items.question: Can I process large libraries?
items.answer: Yes. Batch upgrade product lines to standardize quality without reshooting.

items.question: How do credits work at scale?
items.answer: Credits depend on resolution and volume. Start with a representative sample, then roll out to full catalogs.
